title: Wheel strategy is boring… until it’s not
author: Amanda-Medina
selftext:
I’ve been running the wheel for a while and honestly… most days are pretty boring.

Collect some premium, wait, repeat.

Then days like this happen.

\+$22k today.

Not saying this is normal (it’s not), but it kinda makes me question why more people don’t run this strategy consistently.

I’m not doing anything crazy either just sticking to a few names I’m comfortable holding and letting the premiums stack.

Feels simple… maybe too simple?

I've created a free group where I share my strategies. If you're interested, please leave a comment or send me a private message, and I'll invite you to join and share with you.

comments.author: HappyThrasher99
comments.body: Scam bot. Stolen screenshot. Do not interact. Welcome to the dead internet

replies.author: Amanda-Medina
replies.body: Just because you asked me for money and I didn't give it to you, does that make me a scammer?

comments.author: Classic-Dependent517
comments.body: Sorry i am new to options but as for strategies like opton wheels have limited gains (meaning there wont be any surprises). And if this is correct your post doesnt make sense
